androidx.preference.PreferenceScreen.android:summary: The visual style of the game world

androidx.preference.Preference.android:title: Select custom tileset image
androidx.preference.Preference.android:summary: Choose an image file from your device

androidx.preference.EditTextPreference.android:title: Custom tile width
androidx.preference.EditTextPreference.android:summary: Width of a single tile in pixels

androidx.preference.EditTextPreference.android:title: Custom tile height
androidx.preference.EditTextPreference.android:summary: Height of a single tile in pixels

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Smooth tile scaling
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Use bilinear filtering for smoother tile graphics on modern displays

androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:title: Volume up action
androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:summary: The action performed when pressing the volume up key

androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:title: Volume down action
androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:summary: The action performed when pressing the volume down key

androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:title: Travel command
androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:summary: When to invoke the Travel command if a position is clicked

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Lock view
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Do not move the view with the character when the entire map can fit the screen

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Monospace mode
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Use a monospace font for nicer typography

com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:title: Status background opacity
com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:summary: The background opacity of the status lines
com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:dialogMessage: The opacity between invisible (0) and opaque (255)

com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:title: Map border opacity
com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:summary: The opacity of the border around the map
com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:dialogMessage: The opacity between invisible (0) and opaque (255)

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Always show in portrait
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Always show the directional overlay in portrait mode

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Always show in landscape
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Always show the directional overlay in landscape mode

androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:title: Portrait location
androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:summary: The location of the overlay in portrait mode

androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:title: Landscape location
androidx.preference.ListPreference.android:summary: The location of the overlay in landscape mode

com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:dialogMessage: The opacity between invisible (0) and opaque (255)

com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:summary: The relative size of the overlay
com.tbd.forkfront.SliderPreference.android:dialogMessage: Change the relative size of the overlay buttons

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Allow map input with overlay
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Allow directional input by clicking on the map when the overlay is shown

androidx.preference.Preference.android:title: Edit on-screen overlay
androidx.preference.Preference.android:summary: Customize the layout of on-screen controls

androidx.preference.PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Allow players to share bones files over the internet

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Hearse
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Bones sharing. Don't use Hearse with Wizard Mode bones

androidx.preference.EditTextPreference.android:summary: How Hearse admins can contact you if needed
The name displayed on Hearse website

androidx.preference.EditTextPreference.android:title: User token
androidx.preference.EditTextPreference.android:summary: You can copy this to keep your identity across multiple devices

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Keep my bones
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Default is to delete bones after upload

androidx.preference.Preference.android:summary: Hearse is hosted by Krollmark. Click here to visit the Hearse website

androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Use fallback renderer
androidx.preference.CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this if you experience rendering problems
